title: Alleged driver named after Comic Con crash
contentSnippet: The man police allege drove into a crowd outside Supanova Comic Con, killing one, has been named in court.

title: Trump threatens Iranian bridges as talks set to continue
contentSnippet: US President Donald Trump said the US would destroy every bridge and power plant in Iran if Tehran does not accept a peace proposal. Negotiations are set to resume in Pakistan soon. Follow DW for more.
